title: Files, Paths, CSV, JSON, and Data Boundaries · Language Clinic: Python Json Contracts
summary: Import, validate, transform, and safely publish local nonprofit program data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python json contracts increment in a repeatable data-quality reporting pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Encode and decode JSON while validating required shape, types, missing values, and unsupported Python objects.
Read and write CSV with dialect, header, newline, type-conversion, and malformed-row policies.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
